diffs.diff:
--- a/train.py
+++ b/train.py
@@ -33,7 +33,6 @@
         for x, y in loader:

             x, y = x.to(device), y.to(device)

             pred = model(x)

-            # Denormalize for MAE

             pred_raw = pred * (std + 1e-8) + mean

             y_raw = y * (std + 1e-8) + mean

             total_mae += torch.abs(pred_raw - y_raw).sum().item()

@@ -71,7 +70,7 @@
 

     optimizer = torch.optim.Adam(model.parameters(), lr=1e-3, weight_decay=1e-5)

     scheduler = torch.optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(optimizer, T_max=50)

-    criterion = nn.MSELosis()

+    criterion = nn.MSELoss()

 

     best_val_mae = float('inf')

     epochs = 10

@@ -118,4 +117,4 @@
 

 

 if __name__ == '__main__':

-    main()

+    main()
